nasb.text: until the Lord gives rest to your fellow countrymen as to you, and they also possess the land which the Lord your God will give them beyond the Jordan. Then you may return every man to his possession which I have given you.’

esv.text: until the Lord gives rest to your brothers, as to you, and they also occupy the land that the Lord your God gives them beyond the Jordan. Then each of you may return to his possession which I have given you.’

cnv.text: 直到耶和華使你們的兄弟，像你們一樣得了安身的地方；他們也佔領了耶和華你們的　神在約旦河西賜給他們的地，然後你們各人才可以回到我賜給你們作產業的地去。’

ccb.text: 等你们的上帝耶和华使其他以色列人和你们一样有了安身之所，占领了耶和华赐给他们的约旦河西之地后，你们才可以返回我分给你们的家园。’
